summary: The South Bay closed out April on a funding tear: SiFive landed a $400M Series G, Aria Networks grabbed $125M, and Also secured $200M in a Series C, while nEye.ai, Elorian, and Lightwheel all crossed nine figures in recent weeks. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable or growing, though a few companies are trimming sails. This week brings community events like an AAPI mixer at the Rotary Summit Center and a 21+ space-themed party at The Tech Interactive.
